ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the image belongs to */,
  "modality" TEXT /* Imaging modality used (e.g., CT, MRI) */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., CT, MRI) */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features extracted from the image */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis associated with the image */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date when the image study was performed */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the image study */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_modality FOREIGN KEY ("modality") REFERENCES modalities ("modality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_image_type FOREIGN KEY ("image_type") REFERENCES image_types ("image_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modalities" (
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modality */,
  "modality_name" TEXT /* Name of the modality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modality */,
  "modality_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the modality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_types" (
  "image_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image type */,
  "image_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the image type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image type */,
  "image_type_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the image type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the diagnosis belongs to */,
  "diagnosis_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, researcher, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the image was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)
